title: Telling your younger self she's allowed
subtitle: A five-minute guided visualisation for releasing the earliest version of the guilt around wanting.
excerpt: A guided visualisation for going back to the version of you who first learned that wanting was wrong, and telling her she was mistaken. Use on Day 15 of the MONEY program or any time the guilt around wanting feels old and settled.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 15 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the guilt around wanting feels old rather than recent — like it was decided a long time ago.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation for releasing the origin of the guilt around wanting. You locate the version of you who first received the message that wanting was too much, and you tell her something different.
— the grounding principles are the same.
Sit comfortably with your eyes closed. Take three slow breaths.

Let a younger version of yourself come to mind — the age is wherever your mind lands, and that age is right. She is in a scene you know: a room, a table, a car, a moment when someone communicated to her that wanting was wrong, or greedy, or too much.

Look at her. She is not wrong to want what she wants. She received a message that wasn't about her at all — it was about the person who gave it, and about the time and circumstances they were navigating.
Tell her: wanting is allowed. You are allowed to want this. You have always been allowed.
Let her hear it. Watch her face.
Open your eyes when ready. Write one line about what she looked like when she heard it if you want to hold onto it.
Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 15 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
